docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANDREW KAUFTEIL. DEFENDANT SONIC.NET, INC.
